_comment: Maps a BLB module domain to the Distribution Bundle repo that owns it and the contract path it mounts at in the composed app. Used by scripts/ci/compose-module.php to check out cross-domain dependencies during module CI, and by scripts/ci/setup-sonar.php for SonarCloud project + SONAR_TOKEN bootstrap. Keys are the domain segment of a module id (people/attendance -> people). The 'core' domain is intentionally absent: it ships in the platform repo and is always present. Extensions are intentionally excluded: they are mostly private licensee repos and are not run by this shared CI.
